query_title: What to Expect When You're Expecting

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
recommendations.overview: The continuing adventures of the Portokalos family. A follow-up to the 2002 comedy, "My Big Fat Greek Wedding."

recommendations.title: Waking Ned
recommendations.overview: When a lottery winner dies of shock, his fellow townsfolk attempt to claim the money.

recommendations.title: I Swear
recommendations.overview: Diagnosed with Tourette Syndrome at 15, John Davidson navigates his way against the odds through troubled teenage years and into adulthood, finding inspiration in the kindness of others to discover his true purpose in life.

recommendations.title: Don't Blame the Kid
recommendations.overview: After a one-night stand results in pregnancy, a young woman decides to become partners with the emotionally immature father-to-be.

recommendations.title: Everybody's Fine
recommendations.overview: Eight months after the death of his wife, Frank Goode looks forward to a reunion with his four adult children. When all of them cancel their visits at the last minute, Frank, against the advice of his doctor, sets out on a road trip to reconnect with

recommendations.title: Nanny McPhee
recommendations.overview: Widower Cedric Brown hires Nanny McPhee to care for his seven rambunctious children, who have chased away all previous nannies. Taunted by Simon and his siblings, Nanny McPhee uses mystical powers to instill discipline. And when the children's great-

recommendations.title: Look Both Ways
recommendations.overview: On the night of her college graduation, Natalie's life splits into parallel realities after she takes a pregnancy test. What will life and love bring?

recommendations.title: Juno
recommendations.overview: Faced with an unplanned pregnancy, sixteen year old high-schooler, Juno MacGuff, makes an unusual decision regarding her unborn child.

recommendations.title: Obvious Child
recommendations.overview: An immature, newly unemployed comic must navigate the murky waters of adulthood after her fling with a graduate student results in an unplanned pregnancy.

recommendations.title: Call Jane
recommendations.overview: A married woman with an unwanted pregnancy lives in a time in America where she can't get a legal abortion and works with a group of suburban women to find help.
